rankings.title: Power Analysis for Subtomogram Averaging of OMV Budding Intermediates Sets Feasibility Boundary
rankings.rationale: Highest groundedness and testability in the session. Establishes the feasibility framework for the most impactful hypothesis (E1/budding site architecture). The pilot dataset design is immediately actionable.

rankings.title: GMM Analysis of Cryo-EM OMV Populations Distinguishes Biogenesis Pathways
rankings.rationale: Strong statistical framework applied to a genuine measurement gap. BIC model selection properly handles the discrete vs continuous question. delta-ompA validation is a good genetic control.

rankings.title: Periplasmic Chaperone DegP Co-localization via Cryo-ET Difference Mapping
rankings.rationale: Most mechanistically specific hypothesis — proposes a concrete cargo sorting agent (DegP chaperone). Difference mapping approach is creative. Wounded by pleiotropic concern but addressable with protease-dead mutant.

rankings.title: ML-Guided Template Matching Identifies OMV Cargo Proteins In Situ
rankings.rationale: Highest novelty and impact potential but wounded by resolution concerns. If feasible, would transform OMV biology — label-free cargo identification. The false positive rate concern is addressable with knockout validation.

diversity_check.note: Improved technique diversity over cycle 1 — C2-H3 and C2-H4 introduce genetic and ML-based approaches alongside traditional cryo-EM analysis.

elo_sanity_check.C2-H3_vs_C2-H4: C2-H3 wins (more feasible despite lower novelty)
